title: IBC 2026
summary: Europe's flagship broadcast-industry show. Expect OGraf demos and presentations across multiple vendor stands — monitor the show page as sessions are announced.

title: SMPTE VIBE: OGraf — Making Broadcast Graphics Open and Interoperable
location: NAB Show, Las Vegas · N259LMR · 2:20–2:35 p.m.
speaker: Willem Vermost, EBU
summary: The EBU's Willem Vermost introduces OGraf at SMPTE's VIBE conference — how one graphic package runs across mixed vendor stacks, covering live broadcast, streaming, and post-production.

title: OGraf at Open Source Meetup · IBC 2025
speaker: Niels Borg
summary: Niels Borg's OGraf talk at the Open Source Meetup during IBC 2025 — part of a broader open-source-in-broadcast session.

title: OGraf: A new HTML standard — EBU Network Technology Seminar 2025
speaker: Niels Borg
summary: Technical deep-dive presentation at the EBU Network Technology Seminar covering OGraf's architecture, manifest format, and server API direction.

title: HTML graphics in broadcast applications with EBU's OGraf spec
summary: Public EBU webinar walking through OGraf's role in practical broadcast applications and the problem space it addresses.

title: EBU's Open Standard for HTML Graphics in the Broadcast Industry
summary: Early public session introducing the draft HTML graphics spec that became OGraf.

title: Evolution of the Control Room — IBC 2024 Accelerator
summary: Pre-OGraf context: the IBC Accelerator project that included HTML-based graphics as a workstream and helped seed the case for an open standard.
